top_categories.workout_context: Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 93 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before March.
Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo's mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
At mile 60 of 93, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo. Train it until it feels boring.
At Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 93 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Smooth pedaling at 93 miles saves muscle. Bad technique at mile 10 is invisible. At mile 80 it's a cramp.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 3,996ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo’s 93 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.terrain: Highly technical terrain at Omloop Het Nieuwsblad Cyclo demands practice on similar surfaces. Ride mixed terrain at race-day cadence weekly. Practice cornering, descending, and power delivery on unstable surfaces. Dial in tire pressure before race week — 5 PSI wrong costs you 15+ minutes over 93 miles.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Gravel Specific, Race Simulation, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 93 miles of mixed terrain in Ghent, Belgium.
